name: Annie
description: A descending double-under and sit-up ladder (50-40-30-20-10) — the jump-rope analog to Fran's barbell-and-gymnastics couplet, testing coordination as much as conditioning.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
